title: Excalibur | Variants&Ventures Support
description: This is a support pack that converts Variants&Ventures Mod textures to match the awesome Excalibur resourcePack.
body:
![Excalibur Variants&Ventures support](https://i.postimg.cc/rswyK7MF/Excalibur-Variantsand-Ventures-Presentation-1.png)

This is a support pack that converts [VariantsandVentures](https://modrinth.com/mod/variants-and-ventures) Mod textures to match the awesome [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) resourcePack.

__**Features**__

*   All mobs retextured to match Excalibur resourcepack seamlessly

__**Installation :**__

Ingame

\-> Click "Options…"

\-> Click "Resource Packs…"

\-> Click "Open Resource Pack Folder"

\-> Drag and Drop the Excalibur\_Variants&Ventures.zip file into the "resourcepacks" folder

\-> Move the Excalibur Variants&Ventures Support resource pack from the left column to the right

\-> Make sure that the support pack is placed above the original Excalibur resource pack

\-> Select "Done"

__**Mobs Showcase :**__

![Excalibur Variants&Ventures support Models showcase](https://i.postimg.cc/QtXhyvBk/Excalibur-Variantsand-Ventures-Support-Models-2.png)

__**Credits :**__

Maffhew : Author of [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) resourcepack  
Faboslav : Author of the mod [VariantsandVentures](https://modrinth.com/mod/variants-and-ventures) Mod textures to match the awesome [Excalibur]
